title: Neofindle
description:
A modpack for the neofindle server.

Mainstays are farmer's delight and other cozy mods similar :)
body:
A modpack for the neofindle SMP

This modpack contains around ~150 mods, the majority of which are either small or perfomance based. It has some larger content mods such as Create and Cobblemon.

It is designed for exploration with curios, plenty of structure datapacks, and of course the great lootr chest system. 

This modpack works great for a smaller group of friends, 5-10 people. It may not be suited for extra large groups as perfomance may struggle. 

On the client side it runs very well, on a low end ~70fps without shaders, on a high end 400+ without shaders.
